title: Draft RBI (Commercial Banks – Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Sixth Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI revises the definition of revenue reserves to exclude provisions and liabilities. The change enhances transparency and consistency in financial statements.
The post Draft RBI (Commercial Banks – Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Sixth Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
